name: wxcode-admin-aegis-insurance
title: Aegis Admin
description: Institutional light-mode admin aesthetic: white cards on a cool #f6f8fb page, deep-navy sidebar (#0f2057) with teal accent (#14b8a6), navy-600 (#2563eb) as the primary interactive color, Inter type, and inline sparklines. Archetype = 240px grouped sidebar (entity switcher + labeled nav groups) + sticky topbar + 4 KPI cards + horizontal pipeline board (4 stages) + 2-column lower grid (records table + side panel) + full-width inline SVG trend chart, plus matching list, form, and detail screens.

query.en: Apply this light institutional admin aesthetic to my domain — white cards on cool-grey page, deep-navy sidebar with teal accent, 4 KPI cards with sparklines, horizontal pipeline board, grouped nav sidebar, records table with side panel, and an inline SVG trend chart, plus list, form, and detail screens.
query.zh-CN: 将这个浅色机构风格应用到我的领域：白色卡片搭配冷灰底色、深海军蓝侧边栏与青绿强调色、4 个 KPI 卡片含迷你折线图、水平流程看板、分组导航侧边栏、记录表格与侧栏面板，以及内联 SVG 趋势图，并配套列表 / 表单 / 详情页面。

provenance.note: original archetype; no third-party template reproduced
